title: trifolium fragiferum var. modestum
intro: Trifolium fragiferum var. modestum, also known as strawberry clover, is a perennial legume that belongs to the pea family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of strawberry clover include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce blood sugar levels, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, strawberry clover has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
